title: Strongthium GX340 GX390 Tune Up Parts Carb Kit for Honda Predator 11 13 hp 420cc w/Carburetor + Pull Start + Coil + Air Filter + Spark Plug + Throttle Springs + Gaskets
features: The carb fits for Honda Harbor Freight Predator Champion Generac Powerhorse Bilt Hard Duromax 338cc 389cc 420 440cc GX 340 390 11hp 13hp motors. Part #: 16100-ZF6-V01,16100-ZF6-V00,16100-ZF2-V00,16100-ZF2-V01 16100-ZH8-W61 16100-ZF6-V01 16100-ZF6-V00,16100-ZF2-V00,16100-ZF2-V01. Normally it's not for generators.

The recoil fits for 28400-ZE3-W01ZA 28400-ZE3-W02ZP; the ignition coil fits for 30500-ZE2-023 30500-ZF6-W02 30500-Z5T-003, the air filter fits for17210-ZE3-000 17210-ZE3-010 17210-ZE3-505 17218-ZE3-505 ; the spark plug is F6TC model.

Also for Honda replica engines Predator Champion Duromax Powerhorse Coleman Generac Ryobi Homelite Blackmax Ducar Lifan Loncin Zongshen etc., for pressure washers, water pumps, trash pumps, tiller, mini bike, go karts, log splitters, air compressors and many others.
Suitable for making your old engine workable in reasonable low cost, please note the parts are not original ones.

Package includes 1x carburetor and mounting gaskets, 1x pull cord assembly, 1x air filter, 1x fuel line, 1x switch, 1x spark plug, 1 x ignition coil, 1x throttle spring set, 1x valve cover & exhaust gaskets.
description: Product Description Recoil Fits For 28400-ZE3-W01ZA 28400-ZE3-W02ZP Ignition Coil Fits For 30500-ZE2-023 30500-ZF6-W02 30500-Z5T-003 Spark Plug is F6TC Model Gaskets Air Filter Throttle Return Spring Kit
